description: Sample product guardrails and limits for KITT use-case-check. Extend with product-specific files.

limits.notes: Adobe Experience Platform streaming ingestion peak RPS
Check licensing for Enterprise vs Standard
Adobe Journey Optimizer message throughput; check tier
API rate limit for Journey Optimizer
Cloud Service vs on-prem; check contract

riskPatterns.description: Use case requires RPS above product limits
riskPatterns.mitigation: Consider batching, rate limiting, or tier upgrade

riskPatterns.description: Required product/tier not in current entitlements
riskPatterns.mitigation: Verify with Panorama or sales; document gap for procurement

riskPatterns.description: Customer requires data in specific region
riskPatterns.mitigation: Confirm product supports region; check AEP data residency options
